'''Scarab droids''' were small [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] manufactured by [[Sienar Intelligence Systems/Legends|Sienar Intelligence Systems]]. There were eighteen versions of the scarab droid, and all could fit in the palm of a hand. Each version had a different set of weapons and equipment, including spines, claws, and flesh-eating shredders. Specific models included the [[Scarab Mark VI assassin droid]].<ref name="EGTD" />
